name: Context Topics
description: Project continuity for one agent: switch, capture, and close topic hats with their own memory, decisions, and artifacts.

commandAliases.name: topic
commandAliases.description: Context Hat project rooms. Commands: /topic list, /topic new <name>, /topic capture <name>, /topic <name>, /topic status, /topic panel [name], /topic close, /topic refresh, /topic doctor, /topic clear.
